pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and setup_artifactory.sh confirm the artifact is uploaded to the auto-created example-repo-local repository.
setup_task.sh uploads the JAR to this exact path under example-repo-local. The path matches the standard Maven structure.
Task description and verifier.py explicitly require these properties to be set on the artifact.
setup_artifactory.sh explicitly sets ARTIFACTORY_URL to http://localhost:8082 and docker-compose exposes this port.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real Apache Commons Lang 3.14.0 JAR downloaded from Maven Central and uploaded to the default 'example-repo-local' Artifactory repository. Artifactory is configured with default credentials (admin/password) and runs on localhost:8082. The target properties (build.name=commons-lang3-release, build.number=42, qa.status=approved, deploy.env=production) are arbitrary task requirements, not inherent properties of the artifact.
